changes.text: Initial scaffold — register repos, scan every commit, browse timeline + per-commit architecture snapshots
Python AST analyzer with LOC, fan-in/out, instability, LCOM4 per module
Generic LOC fallback for non-Python files (TODO: deeper analysis via tree-sitter)
Hot-spots view — modules with worst-trending metrics over a window
Configurable commit filter (all / since / last_n / range / sha_list); default scans every commit
